top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 126, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Old Mutual Wealth Double Century's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before November.
Old Mutual Wealth Double Century's mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Old Mutual Wealth Double Century's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 126 miles.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Old Mutual Wealth Double Century's mixed terrain actually does to you.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 126 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Old Mutual Wealth Double Century. Train it until it feels boring.
126 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
2-minute all-out efforts on mixed terrain. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 126 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Tempo is Old Mutual Wealth Double Century's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 126 miles on mixed terrain. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Old Mutual Wealth Double Century’s 126 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Old Mutual Wealth Double Century. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, VO2max, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 126 miles of mixed terrain in Swellendam, Western Cape, South Africa.
